Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Endross Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — An Endross Incarnation is fueled by rage.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The second Endross Incarnation has gone quiet/vanished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Leah fears the Endross Incarnation because he might destroy outposts in a violent mood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Endross Incarnation is a man blazing with blue-white lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Endross Incarnation swoops down on crowds making a show of lights and sounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Endross Incarnation hovers over the Damascan camp on stormcloud wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Endross Incarnations act like natural disasters, tearing the land and people apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Endross Incarnation is a participant in a staged contest against King Zakareth the Sixth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — The Endross Incarnation was part of a setup involving King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Endross Incarnation attacks on wings of cloud and lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The only Incarnation on the battlefield was the Endross Incarnation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
